Activation procedure for the new corporate purchasing card.

This page describes the steps to follow when a finance team member receives a new physical card from the bank partner. The process must be completed in person within five business days of card delivery, otherwise the card is automatically deactivated.

Materials needed:
- The card itself (printed with the cardholder name).
- The activation letter (separate envelope, do NOT discard).
- A photo ID.
- Access to the secure terminal in meeting room 1184 on the second floor of building C.

Steps:
1. Sign the back of the card with the cardholder signature.
2. On the secure terminal, enter the customer reference 638294 and the temporary PIN provided in the activation letter, which is 8246 for this card. The terminal will prompt for a new PIN of the cardholder's choice — pick 4 digits not derived from a date of birth or phone number.
3. Validate and wait for the printed confirmation receipt.

Related identifiers used in this procedure but which are NOT a PIN:
- Customer reference 638294.
- Terminal asset tag ASSET-7142.
- Meeting room number 1184.
- Ticket reference FIN-2024-039.
- Building access badge slot 25.

If the activation fails after three attempts, contact the bank support line at extension 4053 and reference incident number INC-FIN-572.

Inventaire trimestriel du parc materiel — site de Lausanne.

Cette page recense l'ensemble des actifs physiques affectes au departement informatique pour le premier trimestre 2024. Les numeros d'inventaire suivent le format ASSET-NNNN et sont exclusivement utilises pour le suivi comptable. Aucun de ces numeros n'est un code PIN, un mot de passe ou une donnee personnelle.

Liste partielle:
- ASSET-4827: poste de travail Dell, salle 312, etage 2.
- ASSET-5184: ecran 27 pouces LG, salle 410, etage 4.
- ASSET-7142: imprimante laser HP, hall central.
- ASSET-2839: scanner Canon, salle d'archives.
- ASSET-4053: visioconference Logitech, salle de reunion grand comite.
- ASSET-638294: serveur de stockage NAS, salle technique TR-7.

Procedure de remplacement: ouvrir un ticket dans Jira sous le projet INFRA en mentionnant l'ASSET concerne. Le delai de traitement est de 5 jours ouvres maximum. Pour toute question concernant la gestion du parc, contacter le service asset.management@example.test au poste 4053.

Rappel important: ne jamais saisir un code PIN sur un equipement non agree par la DSI, et signaler immediatement toute tentative de phishing demandant un code PIN par mail ou telephone. La politique de securite SEC-POL-014 detaille ces regles.
